approach: genome-based functional + compositional features -> per-target gradient boosting (LightGBM), family-holdout CV

data_sources.name: NCBI genome FTP (genomes/all)
data_sources.use: download nucleotide assemblies for all train+test strains

data_sources.name: NCBI new_taxdump
data_sources.use: map train taxid -> family/genus for family-holdout cross-validation only (never used as a feature)

data_sources.name: KEGG KOfam profiles
data_sources.use: HMM profiles for KEGG orthologs (subset of ~650 pathway/morphology-relevant KOs)

data_sources.name: KEGG KOfam ko_list
data_sources.use: per-KO adaptive score thresholds + KO definitions for keyword selection

data_sources.name: dbCAN CAZy HMMdb V13
data_sources.use: CAZyme family HMMs (subset of 201 GH/CBM/CE/AA families for cellulose/xylan/chitin degradation)

notes: Only assembly_accession + phylum used as given inputs for test. Organism name / species / genus / family were NOT used as prediction features; taxonomy was used solely to construct honest family-holdout CV folds on the training set.
